promotions.headline: SammyC's Skool is Live
promotions.short_detail: Research modules, vendor intel & direct access to Sam.
promotions.full_detail: SammyC's Skool community is now live. Get direct access to Sam, research peptide modules, vendor intel, and community discussion.

promotions.headline: Buy 2, get 1 free, mix and match
promotions.short_detail: Plus an extra 10% off sitewide with code SAMMYC
promotions.full_detail: Glacier Aminos is running a buy 2, get 1 free deal across mix and match compounds. Code SAMMYC adds an additional 10% off sitewide. Confirm the final discount, stacking, and eligible products directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks to 55% off
promotions.short_detail: Plus free patriotic vial covers, daily winners & a $500 grand prize
promotions.full_detail: Southern Aminos is running a Fourth of July sale with 40% off sitewide, stackable up to 55% off. Every order gets a free patriotic vial cover, with daily winners, five free Adamax 10-vial giveaways, and a $500 grand prize. Runs June 29 through July 4. Confirm the final discount, stacking, and giveaway terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 20% off first order, plus tiered savings
promotions.short_detail: New customers get 20% off, stacks with 10% SAMMYC. Tiers up to 35% off + 5% Zelle
promotions.full_detail: New customers receive 20% off their first order, stackable with the 10% SAMMYC discount. Solyn also runs a tiered volume discount: 10% off when buying 1 compound, 25% off when buying 5 compounds, 30% off when buying 10 compounds, and 35% off when buying 20 compounds. Paying with Zelle adds another 5% off. Code SAMMYC stacks on top of all tiers. Confirm eligibility and final checkout pricing directly with Solyn Compounds.

Every new batch is now 7X tested, including endotoxins, heavy metals, and sterility. Promotions apply automatically where eligible. Confirm final eligibility and stacking details directly on the vendor website.
